evidence.description_en: R1-Distill-Qwen-8B vs Qwen3-235B-thinking comparison on reasoning benchmarks

evidence.description_en: Minitron improves MMLU by +16% vs from-scratch training

evidence.description_en: Accuracy gains of 13% and 18% when scaling sleep-time compute
